queries.question: Empirical analysis of the statistical impact of loan duration in months on the reduction of credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Determinants of credit risk associated with the absence of a checking account and its contribution to increased default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Investigation into the relationship between critical credit history or other existing credits and decreased credit risk exposure.
